positive: Stylized geometric floral pattern featuring oversized peony blooms and tropical monstera leaves. The design must be highly contrasting black ink silhouettes against a crisp, clean background, suitable for a repeat textile pattern. Use a modern, sophisticated graphic style with sharp, defined edges. Focus on symmetry and bold composition. The composition should feel elegant, bold, and minimalist, designed to read well as a repeating pattern on apparel. Studio photography look, perfect print quality, high contrast, clean lines, vibrant yet sophisticated palette of black and deep teal.
